季度汇报.use_case: 季度经营复盘与下季度规划汇报
季度汇报.core_message: 业绩达成、关键风险与下阶段行动
季度汇报.image_approach: Primarily A) No images on data slides; D) Web-sourced for team or product photos when needed

_schema_notes.version: Schema version; bump on breaking changes.
_schema_notes.last_updated: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp set by user_defaults.py save.
_schema_notes.default_canvas: Global canvas format ID (a). See references/canvas-formats.md.
_schema_notes.page_count_range: Global recommended page count band (b), e.g. 12-18.
_schema_notes.style_mode: Global communication mode (d layer 1): A/B/C per strategist.md.
_schema_notes.default_style: Legacy alias for style_descriptor at global level.
_schema_notes.color_scheme: Global color object (e): primary, secondary, accent, background, text HEX.
_schema_notes.default_color_scheme: Legacy string alias for color_scheme when not an object.
_schema_notes.icon_approach: Global icon option (f): A/B/C/D per strategist.md.
_schema_notes.icon_library: When icon_approach is C: one stylistic library id, e.g. tabler-filled.
_schema_notes.default_font: Legacy shorthand; maps to typography_plan.body_stack when plan absent.
_schema_notes.image_approach: Global image strategy (h): A/B/C/D/E or mixed description.
_schema_notes.scene_defaults: Per-scene overrides keyed by scene name (季度汇报, 学术答辩, etc.). Same keys as top-level preference fields.
